prompt: Add the logo from the second image to the top right of the first image. Then change the discount to 'Up to 50% OFF', where the words 'Up to' are smaller than '50% OFF'. Finally, replace the text 'Order Now' with the design in the third image. Make sure the size and position matches the original text.
prompt_refined:
Edit image 1 (the burger advertisement poster).
1. Replace the existing 'LOGO HERE' text and icon in the top-right corner of image 1 with the 'Burger Queen' logo from image 2.
2. Modify the text inside the red starburst graphic in image 1 from '50% OFF' to 'Up to 50% OFF'. Ensure 'Up to' is rendered in a smaller font size than '50% OFF'.
3. Replace the yellow 'ORDER NOW' button at the bottom center of image 1 with the complete 'ORDER NOW!' graphic design provided in image 3. The new graphic must precisely match the original button's size and position.
objects: "LOGO HERE" text and icon (should not be present)
red starburst graphic with "Up to 50% OFF" text (where "Up to" is smaller)
"50% OFF" text within starburst (should not be present)
yellow "ORDER NOW" button (should not be present)
"ORDER NOW!" graphic design in bottom center
